examples: It removes the last element in the List, last-in first-out (LIFO) style.
Stacks are used for storing data accessed in Last in, First Out (LIFO) order.
The instructions PUSH and QUEUE correspond to LIFO and FIFO operations on the stack.
My biggest concern is the proposal to eliminate the LIFO method for inventory accounting.
Mr. Van Hollen also draws a bead on the last-in, first-out accounting method known as Lifo.
